header.title: Unkyu Hokkaido
header.subtitle: JR Forecast
header.catchphrase: AI-powered train suspension risk prediction for JR Hokkaido

weather.noWarnings: No weather warnings currently in effect

prediction.disclaimer: * This prediction is AI-generated reference information. Please check JR Hokkaido official sources for accurate service status.

verdict.allDaySuspended: Service suspended for the entire day
verdict.scheduleDisruptionContinuing: Schedule disruptions continue after service resumption
verdict.riskPercent: Suspension risk {{prob}}% — Weather may cause delays or partial suspensions
verdict.lowRiskPercent: Suspension risk {{prob}}% — Allow extra time for your journey
verdict.lowRiskNote: Suspension risk is low, but please be aware of weather changes
verdict.veryLowRiskNote: Suspension risk is very low — safe to travel with confidence

advice.allDaySuspended: No service resumption expected today (all-day suspension). We strongly recommend using alternative routes.
advice.reruptionRiskMsg: Service may resume temporarily, but severe weather is forecast to continue. We strongly recommend switching to subway or bus before getting caught in another suspension.
advice.longBattleMsg: Recovery is expected to take {{hours}}+ hours. We strongly recommend switching to subway, bus, or other available transportation instead of waiting.
advice.recoveringSoonMsg: Recovery is expected within about 30 minutes. It may be better to wait at the station rather than switching transportation.
advice.waitAtCafe: Wait at a café until service resumes
advice.waitAtCafeMsg: Service is expected to resume around {{time}}. Rather than waiting in the cold station, we recommend warming up at a nearby café.
advice.noRecoverySchedule: No recovery schedule has been announced. We recommend using alternative routes.
advice.highSuspensionRiskMsgToday: Due to severe weather, there is a high risk of service suspension. We strongly recommend considering alternative routes now.
advice.highSuspensionRiskMsgFuture: Severe weather is expected at the specified time, with high risk of service suspension. Please plan alternative routes in advance.
advice.veryHighRiskMsgTodayLong: Service suspension is imminent. Severe weather is forecast to continue for an extended period. Please consider switching transportation or postponing your trip.
advice.veryHighRiskMsgFutureLong: Service suspension is very likely at the specified time. Severe weather is forecast to continue. Please consider switching transportation or postponing your trip.
advice.veryHighRiskMsgToday: Service suspension is imminent. Please consider switching to subway or other alternatives, or postponing your trip.
advice.veryHighRiskMsgFuture: Service suspension is likely at the specified time. Please arrange alternative transportation in advance or consider postponing your trip.
advice.shortSuspensionMsg: Weather is worsening, but conditions may improve within about {{hours}} hours. Consider waiting at a nearby café.
advice.delayWarning: Watch for delays or sudden suspensions
advice.delayWarningMsgToday: Weather is deteriorating. Take an earlier train if possible. Subway is a reliable alternative.
advice.delayWarningMsgFuture: Weather deterioration is expected. Plan ahead with extra time. Subway transfer is a reliable backup.
advice.delayExpectedMsg: Some delays are expected. Please allow extra time for your journey.

alternatives.title: Alternative Transportation
alternatives.trafficWarning: Due to snowy roads, buses and taxis may take longer than usual (approx. {{multiplier}}x)
alternatives.heavySnowWarning: Heavy snowfall may cause severe delays or cancellation of bus and taxi services
alternatives.stormWarning: Walking is dangerous due to high winds

cookie.message: This site uses Google Analytics and cookies to collect access data for service improvement.

headline.criticalWarning: Severe weather warning — Suspension risk elevated
headline.minorWarning: Weather advisory in effect — Check latest service status
headline.allNormalDetail: All JR Hokkaido lines are currently running on schedule

features.heroDesc2: Predicting suspensions on all 13 JR Hokkaido lines.
features.feat1Desc: AI integrates weather forecasts, past suspension patterns, and line vulnerability. Plan alternatives before JR's official suspension notice.
features.feat2Desc: ① Weather data ② JR official status ③ On-site user reports — all merged in real time. Know both "now" and "what's coming."
features.feat3Desc: Automatic suggestions for intercity buses, taxis, and other alternatives for high-risk segments. No more "the train stopped, what do I do?"
features.feat4Desc: The Soya Main Line and Chitose Line have completely different risks at the same wind speed. Each line's vulnerability is pre-learned for accurate predictions.
features.compTitle: How we differ from existing services
features.comp1Desc: Notifies only after a suspension occurs
features.comp2Desc: Can't tell if trains stop tomorrow
features.comp3Desc: Don't tell you if trains will run
features.compOursDesc: Predict in advance. Decide before it happens.

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Just select the section you want to check
onboarding.step1Desc: Enter your departure and arrival stations in the search form on the top page. All 13 JR Hokkaido lines and major stations are supported.
onboarding.step1Hint: 💡 Tip: Just type one character and station suggestions will appear. Type "sap" to see "Sapporo."
onboarding.step2Subtitle: See probability, status & reasons at a glance
onboarding.step2Desc: Press the search button and AI-calculated suspension risk will be displayed.
onboarding.step2Red: Very high suspension risk. Secure alternatives
onboarding.step3Subtitle: You'll be fine even if trains stop
onboarding.step3Desc: When suspension risk is high, alternative transport options appear automatically below the prediction. One-tap access to intercity bus and taxi info.
onboarding.step3Hint: ⚡ Tip: If you have a flight, book a bus early when risk exceeds 50%.
onboarding.step4Desc: Register frequent routes as favorites for one-tap predictions. Great for commute and school routes.
onboarding.step4Hint: 💡 Tip: Tap the ★ button on the prediction screen to add favorites. Quick morning checks made easy.
